title: Types of Takeovers: In a leveraged buyout (LBO), which of the following is...
summary: Identify typical and non-typical sources of financing in a leveraged buyout.
prompt: In a leveraged buyout (LBO), which of the following is NOT typically a source of financing?

options.text: Firm value decreases due to higher risk
In an LBO, financing typically comes from debt and equity markets

solution: In an LBO, financing typically comes from debt and equity markets, as well as any available cash reserves, but government grants are not a standard source of financing.
